title: Wrapper writes sessions.db + tmux-wraps
description: Wrapper inserts sessions.db row on launch (sid from claude jsonl). tmux new -d -s <name> when enabled. Bash pre-check creates row if missing. Hidden _session-launched / _session-closed CLI subcommands.

context.text: Implemented session ledger lifecycle for wrapper/CLI/TUI/tmux launches: idempotent sessions.db upsert/close, hidden _session-launched/_session-closed commands, stale-jsonl-safe postlaunch linkage, stable tmux session identities, tmux self-registration on new sessions, attach-only paths that do not create duplicate phantom live rows, tmux close footer, and responsive dashboard proof. Verified npm test -- --runInBand, npm run build, npx tsc --noEmit, npm audit --audit-level=moderate, git diff --check, swift build, live dashboard E2E, desktop/mobile screenshots, and Codex adversarial review.
